title: Color Spectrum
description: Color Spectrum adds 24 new block that are just one color.
body:
Color Spectrum adds 24 new block that are just one color   
every color also has a Neon version which give light.

1. Aquamarine  
2. Black  
3. Blue  
4. Brown    
5. Cyan  
6. Deep Sky Blue  
7. Electric Purple  
8. Folly Red  
9. Gray  
10. Green  
11. Indigo  
12. Light Blue  
13. Lime  
14. Magenta  
15. Malachite  
16. Orange  
17. Pink  
18. Purple  
19. Red  
20. Safety Orange  
21. Spring Green  
22. Violet  
23. White  
24. Yellow
